one_time_description: Large non-recurring interest and other revenue of $11,109,298 compared to budget of $62,600 and prior year $847,969 - likely includes a land claim or settlement proceeds
economic_notes: Investments in Centre Creek LP (11% ownership) for real property acquisition in Chilliwack River Valley; Ch-Ihl-Kway-Uhk Forestry LP (12.36%) for forestry activities near Chilliwack; Ch-Ihl-Kway-Uhk Tribe Society (11.11%) for property rental and management. Also holds investment in 1309367 B.C. Ltd and 10,000 Class B units in Kwaw-kwaw-Apilt Pipeline Limited Partnership for Western Indigenous Pipeline Group participation (not yet recorded).
notes: Massive annual surplus of $11.37M vs budget of -$86K driven by 'Interest and other revenue' of $11.1M (budget was $62.6K). This is almost certainly a one-time land settlement or claim payment. The IR 8 Claim is referenced in financing activities where a prior period ISC loan of $12,250 was recognized into income. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $1,181,830 + Seabird Island Band $86,872 + BC Forest Revenue Sharing $35,000 + MCFD $30,000 + FNGST $222,423 (tax-sharing) = $1,556,125 approximate; OSR includes property tax, gaming, GBE income, and the large other revenue. Deferred revenue was fully recognized during the year (from $166,858 to $0). Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided.
